scripts.fixtures:evals:gate: pnpm run fixtures:snapshot && pnpm run fixtures:evidence && pnpm run fixtures:session && pnpm run fixtures:memory && pnpm run fixtures:policy && pnpm run fixtures:safety && pnpm run fixtures:reference-workflow
scripts.fixtures:evals:benchmark: pnpm run fixtures:metrics && pnpm run fixtures:browser-metrics && pnpm run fixtures:live-metrics && pnpm run fixtures:citation-metrics && pnpm run fixtures:latency-cost && pnpm run fixtures:tool-comparison && pnpm run fixtures:adversarial && pnpm run fixtures:real-user-research && pnpm run fixtures:js-renderer
scripts.fixtures:evals:proof: pnpm run fixtures:evals:gate && pnpm run fixtures:evals:benchmark && pnpm run fixtures:action-surface && pnpm run fixtures:session-synthesis && pnpm run fixtures:customer-fit && pnpm run fixtures:customer-proxy && pnpm run fixtures:doc-links && pnpm run fixtures:staged-reference-workflow && pnpm run fixtures:public-reference-workflow && pnpm run fixtures:ops-package && pnpm run fixtures:release-readiness
scripts.test:evals: pnpm run test:evals:gate && pnpm run test:evals:proof && pnpm run test:evals:benchmark
scripts.test:evals:gate: pnpm run fixtures:evals:gate && pnpm exec vitest run --config evals/vitest.gate.config.ts
scripts.test:evals:proof: pnpm run fixtures:evals:proof && pnpm exec vitest run --config evals/vitest.proof.config.ts
scripts.test:evals:benchmark: pnpm run fixtures:evals:benchmark && pnpm exec vitest run --config evals/vitest.benchmark.config.ts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc -p adapters/playwright/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p evals/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm run contracts:check && pnpm run contracts:manifest && pnpm run architecture:check && pnpm run test:rust && pnpm run test:adapter:gate && pnpm run test:evals:gate
scripts.quality:ci: pnpm run lint && cargo fmt --all --check && pnpm run architecture:check && pnpm run typecheck && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && pnpm run test
scripts.quality:sonar-coverage: pnpm run test:adapter:sonar && node scripts/normalize-sonar-lcov.mjs sonar-reports/adapters-playwright/lcov.info adapters/playwright
